title: Founder Runtime Identity Continuation
bounded_scope: Extend RuntimeState to support administrative identities
Resolve authenticated identity after successful authentication
Route Founder to Founder Administration surface
Route Platform Admin to Platform Administration surface
Route SBU Admin to SBU Administration surface
Preserve existing Member, Invitation and Anonymous journeys
implementation_goal: Integrate canonical Founder, Platform Admin, SBU Admin and Member runtime identity resolution into the existing sign-in and sign-up continuation pipeline.
